items.title: Presentation: Beyond Coding: How Senior ICs Grow Influence and Drive Impact
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Beyond Coding: How Senior ICs Grow Influence and Drive Impact. Netflix’s Kasia Trapszo discusses the transition from writing code to scaling organizations.

items.title: GitHub Expands Secret Scanning with General Availability of MCP Server Integration

items.title: AdonisJS v7 Ships End-to-End Type Safety, Reworked Starter Kits and Zero-Config OpenTelemetry
items.summaryShort: AdonisJS v7 Ships End-to-End Type Safety, Reworked Starter Kits and Zero-Config OpenTelemetry. AdonisJS version 7 introduces end-to-end type safety and reworked starter kits, alongside improved documentation.

items.title: Article: Time-Series Storage: Design Choices That Shape Cost and Performance
items.summaryShort: Article: Time-Series Storage: Design Choices That Shape Cost and Performance. Every time-series database makes a set of storage design decisions: how to lay out rows, when to compress, what to partition on.

items.title: Medicare's new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea

items.title: Kevin Hartz’s A* just closed its third fund with $450M
items.summaryShort: Kevin Hartz’s A* just closed its third fund with $450M. The firm takes a generalist approach, backing companies across categories such as AI applications, fintech, healthcare, and security.

items.title: Former Tesla exec and Heron Power CEO Drew Baglino has founded a heat pump startup
items.summaryShort: Former Tesla exec and Heron Power CEO Drew Baglino has founded a heat pump startup. Sadi Thermal Machines is Drew Baglino's second startup since leaving Tesla in 2024.
